input.headline: With one touch, they vanish. Meet the delicate, icy wonders called frost flowers

raw.headline: With one touch, they vanish. Meet the delicate, icy wonders called frost flowers

winner: I found a frost flower that wouldn't vanish with a single touch—it just gave me a frostbite and asked for my number.

candidates.text: I found a frost flower that wouldn't vanish with a single touch—it just gave me a frostbite and asked for my number.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with a clever play on the headline's 'vanish' and a pun on 'frostbite'; concise and specific."}

candidates.text: Frost flowers don't just melt away—they're more like those exes who ghost you after one bad date.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is relatable and uses a common experience (ghosting) to compare with frost flowers, creating surprise and specificity. However, it's slightly generic in its metaphor and could be more concise."}

candidates.text: My girlfriend said I was too cold for her, so we broke up. Turns out she just didn’t like my *frost* humor.
I tried to capture a frost flower with my bare hands—it melted so fast I thought I was holding ice made of regret.
I tried dating a frost flower once—it was really cold, but I just couldn’t melt her away.
